title: First Mapped Bodies
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM SAAScanComplete WHERE WasFirstMappedBy = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} body(ies) mapped for the first time during the report period. Being first to map a world means your name is in the game's database permanently — first-mapped worlds are the explorer's equivalent of planting a flag, and this count shows how many planets and moons now carry your name in the galaxy's cartographic record.
details.help: SAAScanComplete WasFirstMappedBy = 1 (or FirstMappedBy matching the current commander) flags first-mapping events. total drives the title.

tagLines: First cartographic mapping events compiled. Bodies added to the galaxy map under your commander designation.
Your name is on those worlds now. Permanently. The Pilots Federation keeps those records.
Every first-mapped body is a mark you left on the galaxy. Some commander in a thousand years might look it up.
